subcodes.title: Public address given on 1913-02-17
subcodes.first_line: This is the work. All else save this has no result. Humanity must become illumined with the light of the Kingdom, otherwise all our efforts will remain fruitless.
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @attaining the life of the spirit, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation
